footer.description: Ukuthuthukiswa kwesoftware esekelwe eSarajevo, eBosnia. Sakha isoftware yangokwezifiso, izixazululo ze-AI / ML, ukwakhiwa kwamafu, nezinhlelo ezizenzakalelayo.

header.description: Kusuka ekuthuthukisweni kwesoftware yebhizinisi kanye nobuhlakani bebhizinisi obunikwe amandla yi-AI kuya kwingqalasizinda yamafu nezixazululo ze-IoT - siletha izinsizakalo zobuchwepheshe eziphelele ezishayela izinto ezintsha futhi zisheshise ukukhula.

caseStudies.title: Izifundo zakamuva zamacala
caseStudies.description: Isifinyezo semiphumela yokulethwa kuyo yonke i-fintech, ukunakekelwa kwezempilo, ukuthuthwa kwempahla, kanye nezinhlelo zomkhakha womphakathi.

blog.title: Yakamuva kusuka kubhulogi yethu
blog.description: Amanothi wobunjiniyela asebenzayo avela ku-AI yakamuva, ipulatifomu, nomsebenzi wokulethwa kwefu.

innovationLab.title: I-Innovation Lab
innovationLab.description: Hlola ama-prototypes, ukuhlolwa, namaphrojekthi we-R &D asetshenzisiwe avela eqenjini lobunjiniyela be-Horizon Tech.
